name: GOLFTEC Sandy Springs
about: GOLFTEC provides indoor golf instruction and practice using advanced motion measurement technology and high-speed video analysis. Their approach is data-driven, with certified PGA coaches using systems like OPTIMOTION to identify swing flaws and create personalized improvement plans. The venues offer training bays equipped with launch monitors and simulator technology for lessons, practice, and club fittings. Services include personalized lessons, club fitting with data optimization, and practice memberships for self-directed improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION
Personalized improvement plans created by certified PGA coaches
Access to launch monitors and simulator technology for detailed feedback
Club fitting services providing 21 more yards on average
Indoor practice available regardless of weather conditions

simulator_hardware.notes: Used with OPTI software for virtual play and practice

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides equipment during lessons and fittings. For club fitting sessions, you'll test various club options to find the best fit for your swing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services at GOLFTEC locations. It appears to be focused on golf instruction and practice without on-site dining options.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: A full 18-hole virtual round typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play. Practice sessions can be shorter based on your specific training goals.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth golfers. Their instruction approach is suitable for beginners of all ages, and they work with young golfers to develop fundamental skills through their proven system.
